textPlain: >Disclaimer: This library is not related to the MISRA C standard or guidelines. The name "MisraStdC" comes from the author's name, Siddharth Mishra, who is commonly known as "Misra" among friends.Why include the letters Std then? This seems like a purposeful typo-squatting effort and definitely makes me suspicious.
been working on this for some time. has some usable features. i keep adding as i feel the need. try to well document everything and maintain it.
because it's my personal standard. I use it more than I use standard C utils.
